text.title: `agent-fixable` Triage Gate (Humans Pick, Agents Work) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Does the issue carry the `agent-fixable` label applied by a human or by a read-only triage bot?

conclusion.verdict: no precondition; agent must not pick up

branch.when: label_applied == true AND applied_by matches `*-bot$` AND bot_has_write_tools == true

conclusion.verdict: reject: triage identity has code-write privileges
reject: vendor pinning at triage time

text.example: Issue #1402 labelled `agent-fixable` by maintainer alice; dispatch fires on issues.labeled; merge-rate counter increments on merge.
